metadata.description: Test scenarios for nabledge-6: knowledge-search (5) + code-analysis (5)

scenarios.question: バッチの起動方法を教えてください
keywords: アクションのクラス名
scenarios.notes: Keywords match actual content in request-path section. Removed 'バッチ起動' and '起動クラス' which don't appear in knowledge files.

scenarios.question: UniversalDaoでページングを実装したい
scenarios.notes: Keywords and sections match actual paging section content in universal-dao.json.

scenarios.question: データリードハンドラでファイルを読み込むには？
scenarios.notes: Replaced 'usage' with 'processing' (actual section name). Keywords match actual content.

scenarios.question: バッチのエラーハンドリングはどうすればいいですか？
scenarios.notes: Replaced 'exception' with 'errors' (actual section name). Keywords match actual exception classes and concepts.

scenarios.question: バッチアクションの実装方法は？
scenarios.notes: Replaced non-existent sections with actual ones. Keywords match action classes and methods in knowledge files.

scenarios.question: ExportProjectsInPeriodActionの実装を理解したい
expectations: Identifies ObjectMapper usage for CSV output
scenarios.notes: Tests code-analysis workflow with proman batch action. Validates dependency tracing, Nablarch component identification, diagram generation, and documentation output.

scenarios.question: LoginActionの実装を理解したい
expectations: Identifies index method for login screen display
Identifies login method with authentication logic
Creates sequence diagram for authentication flow
scenarios.notes: Tests web action analysis with authentication flow. Validates form injection, session management, and security component identification.

scenarios.question: ProjectSearchActionの実装を理解したい
expectations: Identifies list method for search results display
Creates sequence diagram for search flow
scenarios.notes: Tests search action analysis with pagination. Validates DAO query execution and result list handling.

scenarios.question: ProjectCreateActionの実装を理解したい
expectations: Identifies index method for form display
Identifies BeanUtil usage for entity mapping
Creates sequence diagram for registration flow
scenarios.notes: Tests create action analysis with form validation and entity insertion. Validates bean mapping and transaction management.

scenarios.question: ProjectUpdateActionの実装を理解したい
expectations: Identifies show method for detail display
Identifies optimistic locking with version column
Creates sequence diagram for update flow
scenarios.notes: Tests update action analysis with optimistic locking. Validates entity retrieval, modification, and version control.
